title: Aztec Accelerator Verified Sites Registry
description: Curated list of origins recognized by the Aztec Accelerator maintainers. NOT a security guarantee — see VERIFIED_SITES.md.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Bump on breaking changes.

items.description: Canonical origin: scheme://host[:port], no trailing slash, no path. ASCII only (use Punycode A-labels for IDN). For browser extensions, ONLY chrome-extension:// is reliably curatable; Firefox install UUIDs and Safari schemes are per-user and excluded.

description.description: Internal note — NOT shown in the authorization popup. Used in docs / future Settings UI.

curatedBy.description: GitHub username of the curator who reviewed/added the entry.
